texto: Reading books in one's youth is like looking at the moon through a crevice
autor: reading books in middle age is like looking at the moon in one's courtyard
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a reading books in middle age is like looking at the moon in one's courtyard: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “Reading books in one's youth is like looking at the moon through a crevice” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reflexao.
